description: Final comprehensive analysis figure with AlphaFold confidence, verdict summary, and protein family relationships
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import requests

headers = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0", "Accept": "application/json"}

# Download all three PDB files and extract pLDDT + CA coordinates
def get_af_data(acc):
    url = f"https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-{acc}-F1-model_v6.pdb"
    resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=30)
    plddt = []
    residues = []
    ca_coords = []
    for line in resp.text.split('\n'):
        if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
            resnum = int(line[22:26].strip())
            bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
            x = float(line[30:38].strip())
            y = float(line[38:46].strip())
            z = float(line[46:54].strip())
            plddt.append(bfactor)
            residues.append(resnum)
            ca_coords.append([x, y, z])
    return np.array(residues), np.array(plddt), np.array(ca_coords)

ca_res, ca_plddt, ca_coords = get_af_data('Q5AMS2')
sc_res, sc_plddt, sc_coords = get_af_data('Q08448')
rog_res, rog_plddt, rog_coords = get_af_data('P53118')

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 12))
fig.suptitle('AlphaFold Structure Analysis: LPL1 vs ROG1', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Panel A: pLDDT profiles
ax1 = axes[0, 0]
ax1.plot(ca_res, ca_plddt, 'b-', lw=1, alpha=0.8, label='Ca_LPL1 (Q5AMS2)')
ax1.plot(sc_res, sc_plddt, 'g-', lw=1, alpha=0.8, label='Sc_LPL1 (Q08448)')
ax1.plot(rog_res, rog_plddt, 'r-', lw=1, alpha=0.8, label='Sc_ROG1 (P53118)')
ax1.axhline(y=90, color='gray', ls='--', alpha=0.3)
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='gray', ls=':', alpha=0.3)
ax1.set_xlabel('Residue number')
ax1.set_ylabel('pLDDT')
ax1.set_title('A. AlphaFold Confidence (pLDDT)', fontweight='bold')
ax1.legend(fontsize=8)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 105)

# Mark DUF676 domains
ax1.axvspan(14, 213, alpha=0.08, color='blue')
ax1.text(113, 5, 'Ca DUF676', fontsize=7, ha='center', color='blue')

# Panel B: Domain pLDDT comparison
ax2 = axes[0, 1]
# Ca_LPL1 regions
regions_ca = {
    'DUF676\n(14-213)': ca_plddt[13:213],
    'TM helix\n(286-306)': ca_plddt[285:306],
    'C-terminal\n(350-556)': ca_plddt[349:]
}
# Sc_ROG1 DUF676
regions_rog = {
    'DUF676\n(234-434)': rog_plddt[233:434],
}

labels = list(regions_ca.keys())
ca_means = [np.mean(v) for v in regions_ca.values()]
ca_stds = [np.std(v) for v in regions_ca.values()]

x = np.arange(len(labels))
bars = ax2.bar(x, ca_means, 0.35, yerr=ca_stds, label='Ca_LPL1', color='#6699ff', 
               edgecolor='black', capsize=3)

# Add ROG1 DUF676 for comparison
ax2.bar(3.5, np.mean(rog_plddt[233:434]), 0.35, yerr=np.std(rog_plddt[233:434]),
        label='Sc_ROG1 DUF676', color='#ff9999', edgecolor='black', capsize=3)

ax2.set_ylabel('Mean pLDDT ± SD')
ax2.set_title('B. Regional AlphaFold Confidence', fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xticks(list(x) + [3.5])
ax2.set_xticklabels(labels + ['ROG1\nDUF676'], fontsize=8)
ax2.legend(fontsize=8)
ax2.set_ylim(0, 105)
ax2.axhline(y=90, color='gray', ls='--', alpha=0.3)

# Panel C: Summary evidence table
ax3 = axes[1, 0]
ax3.axis('off')
ax3.set_title('C. Verdict Summary', fontweight='bold')

verdict_text = """
VERDICT: OVER-ANNOTATED

GO:0047372 (monoacylglycerol lipase activity)
on C. albicans LPL1 (Q5AMS2)

Evidence AGAINST MAG lipase annotation:
  ✗ Closest ortholog (Sc_LPL1) = phospholipase B (IDA)
  ✗ Different PANTHER subfamily from ROG1 (SF24 vs SF62)
  ✗ 44.4% identity with Sc_LPL1, only 25.6% with ROG1
  ✗ Lacks InterPro Rog1_fam (IPR016445) signature
  ✗ MAG and phospholipids are different substrate classes
  ✗ ≥2 gene duplications between ROG1 and LPL1

Evidence FOR retaining GO:0004622:
  ✓ Sc_LPL1 has IDA for PC lysophospholipase A1
  ✓ Same PANTHER subfamily (SF24)
  ✓ Conserved catalytic GYSxG motif
  ✓ Shared TM helix and LD localization

RECOMMENDATION: Remove GO:0047372; retain GO:0004622
"""

ax3.text(0.05, 0.95, verdict_text, transform=ax3.transAxes, fontsize=9,
         verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8))

# Panel D: Protein family relationship diagram
ax4 = axes[1, 1]
ax4.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax4.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax4.axis('off')
ax4.set_title('D. Functional Assignment Summary', fontweight='bold')

# Three circles for the three lipase families
from matplotlib.patches import Circle, FancyArrowPatch

# Yju3 family - true MGL
circle1 = Circle((2, 7), 1.5, fill=True, facecolor='#aaddaa', edgecolor='black', lw=2)
ax4.add_patch(circle1)
ax4.text(2, 7.5, 'Yju3p Family\n(PF12146)', ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
ax4.text(2, 6.5, 'PRIMARY\nMAG Lipase\n>90% activity', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='darkgreen')

# ROG1 subfamily - secondary MAG lipase
circle2 = Circle((6, 7), 1.5, fill=True, facecolor='#ff9999', edgecolor='black', lw=2)
ax4.add_patch(circle2)
ax4.text(6, 7.5, 'ROG1 Subfamily\n(SF62, PF05057)', ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
ax4.text(6, 6.5, 'SECONDARY\nMAG Lipase\n(IDA)', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='red')

# LPL1 subfamily - phospholipase B
circle3 = Circle((6, 3), 1.5, fill=True, facecolor='#99ccff', edgecolor='black', lw=2)
ax4.add_patch(circle3)
ax4.text(6, 3.5, 'LPL1 Subfamily\n(SF24, PF05057)', ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
ax4.text(6, 2.5, 'PHOSPHOLIPASE B\n(IDA on Sc_LPL1)', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='blue')

# Ca_LPL1 marker
ax4.plot(7.3, 2.5, '*', color='blue', markersize=20, zorder=10)
ax4.text(8, 2.5, 'Ca_LPL1\n(Q5AMS2)', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='blue')

# Arrows showing relationships
ax4.annotate('', xy=(6, 5.5), xytext=(6, 4.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='<->', color='red', lw=2))
ax4.text(6.8, 5, 'DUPLICATION\n(different\nsubstrates)', fontsize=7, color='red', ha='left')

ax4.annotate('', xy=(3.5, 7), xytext=(4.5, 7),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='<->', color='gray', lw=1.5, ls='--'))
ax4.text(4, 7.7, 'Different\nfamilies', fontsize=7, color='gray', ha='center')

# Crossed-out arrow showing incorrect propagation
ax4.annotate('IBA\n(incorrect?)', xy=(6, 4.5), xytext=(3, 4),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=1.5, ls='--'),
            fontsize=8, color='red', ha='center',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='red'))

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.96])
plt.savefig('final_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final analysis figure saved")
